name: Popcorn Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and oil together.
2. Add the marshmallows to the melted mixture and stir until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the popped corn, chocolate M&Ms, and mixed nuts.
4. Pour the melted marshmallow mixture over the corn mixture.
5. Quickly stir everything together until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into a tube pan and allow it to cool completely.
7. Once cooled, slice the cake as desired.
8. The cake does not require baking; simply let it cool and serve.
